Theorem ovex 7429
Description: The result of an operation is a set. (Contributed by NM, 13-Mar-1995.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
ovex ⊢ (𝐴𝐹𝐵) ∈ V
Proof of Theorem ovex
StepHypRef Expression
1 df-ov 7399 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴𝐹𝐵) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩)
21fvexi 6881 1 ⊢ (𝐴𝐹𝐵) ∈ V
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   ∈ wcel 2142  Vcvv 3454  ⟨cop 4588  (class class class)co 7396
This theorem was proved from axioms:  ax-mp 5  ax-1 6  ax-2 7  ax-3 8  ax-gen 1815  ax-4 1829  ax-5 1930  ax-6 1987  ax-7 2028  ax-8 2144  ax-9 2152  ax-ext 2734  ax-nul 5256
